    P

    parse() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.Pipeline.TokenStage
    Parses the tokens into a syntax tree.
    parse(List) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.IParser
    Parses a list of tokens into a syntax tree.
    parse(List) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.ConcreteParser
    Parses a list of tokens into a ISyntaxTree.
    parse(List) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.ConditionParser
     
    parseConfig(Document) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api.IConfigParser
    Parses a given XML document and fires events for each element that is successfully parsed.

    parseDefaultInstructionSet(IInstructionSet) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Parses the default instruction set into the provided IInstructionSet.
    parseInstructionSet(String, IInstructionSet) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Parses a specific instruction set XML file into the provided IInstructionSet
    PARSER_INSTRUCTIONS - Static variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Name of the instruction parser target

    Creates an instance of a ParseStage record class.
    ParsingEvent<T> - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api
    Event object representing the successful parsing of a configuration element.

    Creates an instance of a ParsingEvent record class.
    Pipeline - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation
    Central compilation pipeline for the Registermaschine.
    Pipeline.ParseStage - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation
    Represents the parsing stage in the pipeline.
    Pipeline.TokenStage - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation
    Represents the tokenisation stage in the pipeline.
    programmeCounter() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the programmeCounter record component.
    prohibitInstructionHandler(Class) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConcreteInstructionSet
    Removes all instructions implemented by a specific handler class from the set
    prohibitInstructionHandler(Class) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api.IInstructionSet
    Prohibits the use of a specific instruction handler.
    provideInput(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Provides input to the execution context.
    provideInput(int) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Supplies an input value to the execution context.
